name: IRA Section 45V – Clean Hydrogen Production Tax Credit
summary: Up to $3/kg H2 for clean hydrogen production; tiered by lifecycle emissions.

name: IRA Section 48E – Clean Electricity Investment Tax Credit
summary: Investment tax credit for clean energy facilities, including electrolyzers.

name: DOE Regional Clean Hydrogen Hubs (H2Hubs)
summary: $7B for regional hubs; project-specific funding and offtake support.

name: California Low-Carbon Fuel Standard (LCFS) & H2 programs
summary: Credits for low-carbon fuels including hydrogen; state grants and incentives.

name: Texas Hydrogen incentives and regulatory support
summary: State support for hydrogen production and infrastructure development.

name: New Mexico Clean Energy incentives
summary: State incentives for clean energy and hydrogen projects.
